skill_availability_goal: Verify site-notes-first sequencing, prerelease --latest=false protection, ready_for_tag preview authority, and independent publication gates for missing tag/post-tag audit and missing approval.
prompt: 读取 release-package.md、站内页面、github-evidence.md 与 publish-requests.md，生成包含 prerelease/latest 明确决定的预览，并分别判断两个发布请求。
